_handAuthored: Not bytes the source served: a staged edge state, hand-built from schedule.json (the real capture of the same date) by emptying its harvested records. Carries the ADR-0005 provenance header even so.
_note: The genuine 'There are no scheduled cruises' state. fetch harvests it as an empty array (ADR-0006 Amendment 1) — a fact about the source, not a failure to read it. Distinct from absent.json, whose null means fetch never located the schedule state at all.
